CONTENT.Career: Gueye made his Ligue 1 debut for Metz on 13 September 2020 in a 1–0 away defeat against Lille. He was to join Ligue 2 side Paris FC on loan in October 2020 but the transfer was cancelled due to an administrative regulation disallowing a loan inside the country.On 25 January 2022, Gueye was loaned to Paris FC until the end of the season.

SUMMARY: Mamadou Lamine Gueye (born 13 March 1998) is a Senegalese professional footballer who plays as a forward for Ligue 2 club Paris FC.
